title: Snippet Library
text: Snippet Library A Snippet Library contains code Snippets that can copied and pasted into your code during development. Description Snippet Libraries are automatically made available in the Snippet tab of the Resource Browser in the Write Script and Design Layout worksheets. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: libsnp Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Property , Snippet Generalization: Main Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: — URI format: libsnp: LibraryName Specialization Snippet Library specializes Main Development Object and Library in the following ways: It can only contain code fragments of any type.
